values: As an operator, I want the root page to orient me to the available eval surfaces so I can navigate without remembering URLs.
GET / returns a styled landing page with links to chat, pilot, adjudication, pilot-admin, health, and representative eval API endpoints.
Scope includes localhost standalone mode only. Smoke: landing page includes primary surfaces and API links
As an operator, I want a health probe so scripts and monitors can confirm the server is alive.
GET /health returns JSON with status ok, package, version, and mode.
As an operator, I want public binds to require credentials so local research surfaces are not exposed accidentally.
Localhost may run open; public HOST requires EVAL auth credentials and role gate is applied before routers.
Spawn public-bind servers with and without credentials
As a maintainer, I want one route/static mount definition so standalone and poetics browser route sets do not drift.
HTTP route smoke for shared API/static mounts
As a learner/tester, I want the chat UI to list available tutor cells so I can pick a condition to try.
The page fetches /api/chat/cells and shows sorted cell metadata including orientation/profile details.
As a tester, I want personas and curricula available in chat so I can configure a realistic learner session.
The page fetches /api/chat/personas and /api/chat/curricula and exposes them in controls.
As a tester, I want to resolve selected cell configuration so I can see what architecture and prompts are actually active.
POST /api/chat/resolve returns summarized cell/factor/prompt metadata and charisma profile where available.
POST /api/chat/resolve maps human-readable features to a cell
Must preserve rule: never infer architecture from cell number alone. Smoke: {"matchQuality":"exact","resolved":"cell_7_recog_multi_unified","score":11}
As a learner, I want to send a message and receive a tutor response.
POST /api/chat/turn accepts current dialogue state and returns tutor output plus visible deliberation trace.
POST /api/chat/turn dryRun returns tutor output and deliberation trace without model spend

Potentially paid/model-backed; use dry/mock path where possible. Smoke: {"finalMessage":"(dry run) Let us test your idea with one small example. What would happen first, and what evidence would tell you that move is right?","roles":["ego","superego","ego_revision"],"totals":{"inputTokens":0,"outputTokens":0,"latencyMs":0}}
As a tester, I want the app to generate learner turns so I can inspect bilateral tutor/learner behavior.
POST /api/chat/learner-turn returns learner ego/superego/revision output for the chosen learner persona/context.
POST /api/chat/learner-turn dryRun returns learner ego/superego/revision trace without model spend

Smoke: {"message":"(dry run) I can answer from a learner stance: I heard the tutor ask about fractions, and I would try a tentative explanation before checking it.","roles":["ego","superego","ego_revision"],"totals":{"inputTokens":0,"outputTokens":0,"latencyMs":0}}
As a participant, I want the pilot to resume my active session after refresh so I do not lose progress.
UI reads session from URL/localStorage, validates via GET /api/pilot/session/:id, and removes stale localStorage on not found.
As a participant, I want to enroll and receive a blinded session assignment.
POST /api/pilot/enroll creates or resumes a non-completed PID session and returns blinded session data.
POST /api/pilot/enroll creates a blinded pid-less smoke session
As a participant, I must consent before moving into intake and testing.
POST /api/pilot/session/:id/consent requires consented true and advances session.
POST consent rejects missing consent and accepts consented true
As a participant, I want to provide intake details before testing.
POST /api/pilot/session/:id/intake stores intake payload and advances phase.
POST intake stores payload and advances phase
As a participant, I want to complete pretest items and have them scored server-side.
Start pretest, fetch form-counterbalanced items, submit responses, and receive scored count/session update.
Start pretest, fetch items, submit server-scored responses
As a participant, I want tutoring to start with a clear time cap and complete cleanly.
POST tutoring/start returns cap and end timestamp; UI streams /api/chat/turn?stream=1; tutoring/complete records completed or timed_out.
POST tutoring start/complete exposes cap and advances status
Likely needs mock or API-key-gated test path. Smoke: {"capMs":900000,"status":"tutoring_done"}
As a participant, I want to complete posttest and exit survey so the session can finish.
POST posttest/start, items?phase=posttest, posttest/submit, and exit move session to completed and clear local session storage.
Start/submit posttest and record exit survey
As an operator, I want pilot admin APIs to require a token.
Admin endpoints return 503 without PILOT_ADMIN_TOKEN and 401 for invalid token; UI stores x-pilot-admin-token locally.
Admin counts rejects missing token and accepts configured token
As an operator, I want counts and session lists so I can monitor pilot progress.
GET /api/pilot/admin/counts and /admin/sessions feed the admin page.
Admin session detail returns session, turns, and tests
As an operator, I want to create synthetic pilot sessions and autoplay them for dogfood/testing.
POST /admin/enroll-llm creates LLM session; POST /admin/session/:id/autoplay drives a session through configured behavior.
Admin autoplay with mock=true runs without paid model calls

May trigger model calls depending configuration. Smoke: {"sessionId":"2d8adfec-ece4-4776-859d-af1c245b2561","condition":"cell_1_base_single_unified"} Smoke: {"sessionId":"2d8adfec-ece4-4776-859d-af1c245b2561","cellName":"cell_1_base_single_unified","learnerSource":"llm","mock":true,"turnPairs":1,"stoppedReason":"max_turn_pairs","status":"tutoring_done","spend":{"inputTokens":0,"outputTokens":0,"estimatedCostUsd":0},"turns":[{"index":0,"role":"learner","content":"I think fractions are just like slicing a pizza, right? Three out of eight slices is 3/8."},{"index":1,"role":"tutor","content":"Pizza is a great anchor. You've got the idea that the bottom number is how many equal slices the whole is cut into. Hold onto that — what does the top number cou...
As a human coder, I want to identify myself or use a key and see only my assigned packets.
GET /api/a19/adjudication/me supports open mode via coder_id and keyed mode via X-A19-Coder-Key.
GET /api/a19/adjudication/me in open mode resolves coder/worklist
As a coder, I want to open a packet and see assignment, codebook, and prior submission state.
GET /assignments/:slug authenticates before revealing assignment existence in keyed mode and returns sanitized packet data.
Fixture server returns sanitized assignment and codebook
As a coder, I want draft responses saved while I work so accidental navigation does not lose coding.
GET/PUT/DELETE /assignments/:slug/draft read, write, and remove drafts; UI saves on input/change and page visibility events.
PUT/GET/DELETE assignment draft round-trip on fixture server
As a coder, I want to submit a completed adjudication form with explicit overwrite control.
POST /assignments/:slug/submissions writes submission; UI requires form fields and exposes overwrite checkbox.
POST submission rejects duplicate unless overwrite is explicit
As the researcher, I want a panel matrix of packets by coders to track completion.
GET /panel returns admin-only completeness state; participant-role requests should be forbidden.
Role-gated panel returns fixture assignment completeness matrix
As a researcher, I want to list scenarios, tutor profiles, learner profiles, and configurations before running evaluations.
GET /api/eval/scenarios, /profiles, /learner-profiles, and /configurations return current config data.
As a researcher, I want to run a quick evaluation for a chosen scenario/profile.
POST /api/eval/quick starts a quick evaluation and returns result metadata; /stream/quick supports event stream progress.
Must confirm request body supports dry/mock before live test. Smoke: {"runId":"eval-2026-06-22-5698a49c","scenarioId":"new_user_first_visit","score":65}
As a researcher, I want API access to full runs, cell comparisons, and matrix runs.
POST /run, /compare, /matrix and stream endpoints start configured evaluations with crash-protected streams.
Potentially expensive if run live. Smoke: {"runId":"eval-2026-06-22-bdfbe707","compareRunId":"eval-2026-06-22-e3559d28","matrixRunId":"eval-2026-06-22-86b1611f","profiles":["budget","default"]}
As a researcher, I want to browse prior runs, incomplete runs, run detail, reports, and completion/resume status.
routes/evalRoutes.js:1691; routes/evalRoutes.js:1732; routes/evalRoutes.js:1748; routes/evalRoutes.js:1763; routes/evalRoutes.js:1917; routes/evalRoutes.js:2821; routes/evalRoutes.js:2840
GET run history endpoints and missing run fail safely
Use EVAL_DB_PATH for mutating tests. Smoke: {"runs":4,"incomplete":0,"missingStatus":404}
As a researcher, I want to browse logs by date/dialogue and inspect transcript entries.
GET dialogue log list/stats and missing dialogue fail safely
As a prompt engineer, I want to view prompt files and request recommendations without the API writing prompts to disk.
GET /prompts and /prompts/:name serve prompt text; POST /prompts/recommend returns read-only recommendation output.
GET prompt catalog/content and POST dry-run prompt recommendations
As an operator, I want monitor summary, sessions, and alerts to inspect long-running evaluation health.
GET monitor summary/sessions/alerts and missing ack fail safely
As a researcher, I want to inspect interaction-level traces, diagrams, and transcripts.
GET /interactions, /interactions/:evalId, /diagram, and /transcript expose bilateral interaction details.
GET interactions list and missing trace/diagram/transcript fail safely
As a researcher, I want API endpoints to create and interact with Codex-backed paper/audit sessions.
POST/GET /codex/sessions, poll/input/delete endpoints, and paper-bug-audit-session create/manage Codex session records.
routes/evalRoutes.js:252; routes/evalRoutes.js:271; routes/evalRoutes.js:285; routes/evalRoutes.js:302; routes/evalRoutes.js:322; routes/evalRoutes.js:339; routes/evalRoutes.js:368
As a researcher, I want to browse poetics runs/items and inspect transcripts.
Poetics /browse page and corpus APIs render seeded item
As a reviewer, I want to label cases and flag review issues from the browser.
POST /api/labels and /api/review-flags persist label/review flag changes.
Save/read browser label and review flag on seeded sidecar item
As a reviewer, I want playable transcript audio without exposing the TTS key in the browser.
POST /api/tts routes text-to-speech server-side; browser binds playback controls to transcript fragments.
POST /api/tts fails safely with blank server-side Lemon Fox key
Keep secret server-side. Smoke: {"status":503,"error":"LEMONFOX_API_KEY is not configured"}
Drama spec compose, validate, write, and suggest
As a designer, I want to compose a drama spec, validate it, write YAML, and request suggestions.
/compose UI calls /api/compose/validate, /write, and /suggest against ontology/schema constraints.
Validate, suggest, and write a drama spec without model calls
As a designer, I want to run a live composed tutoring drama and inspect/save/score it.
/compose/live starts sessions, accepts learner turns, advances tutor, saves, ends, scores, and can show deliberation/debug state.

scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1285; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1286; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1296; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1310; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1320; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1328; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1339; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1349; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:5247
Mock live compose start/advance/score/end flow works without API calls
Ontology, rubric, curriculum, and guide pages
As a researcher, I want reference pages for ontology, rubric, and curriculum so I can inspect the conceptual machinery.
Ontology, rubric, curriculum, and guide pages/APIs render safely
As a researcher, I want to browse replay bundles and individual replay items.
Replay index/API and missing replay item fail safely
Job planning, launch, list, and stop
As an operator, I want to plan, launch, monitor, and stop poetics jobs from the browser.

scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1442; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1443; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1444; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1452; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1462; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1463; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1468; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:7095
Plan, launch, list, get, and stop a free derivation job

Could trigger paid/long-running work; must test with safe job kind. Smoke: {"jobId":"6e77f7c4-8785-453c-adca-09d6ae0f3cdf","costClass":"free","status":"stopped","page":{"status":200,"bodyChars":1029,"screenshotPath":"/Users/lmagee/Dev/machinespirits/machinespirits-eval-derivation/outputs/feature-user-story-tracker/smoke-poetics-runs.png"}}
As a reader, I want the poetics narrative pages to render from the shared techne docs.
GET /summary, /arc, /story, /story-doc, /repertoire, /repertoire-doc, /board, and /board-doc serve the public narrative surfaces.

scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1478; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1479; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1489; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1504; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1516; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1531; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1542; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1557
Summary, arc, story, repertoire, and board docs render from techne pages
As a researcher, I want to browse derivation runs, live runs, and run detail pages.
GET /derivation, /derivation/live, /derivation/:label plus live API endpoints expose derivation artifacts.

scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1103; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1106; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1111; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1562; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1563; scripts/browse-poetics-scripts.js:1566
Derivation index/live pages and APIs render safely
As a public reader, I want a visual explainer of the paper argument.
Static pages under /eval render the Geist explainer and comic panels with lightbox/scroll interactions.
Load Geist explained pages and exercise comic lightbox
Geist in the Machine interactive explainer
As a public reader, I want interactive examples and citation helpers for the paper.
Static page supports pooled/within trend toggle, example buttons, analyzer input, sample loading, and citation copy buttons.
Load Geist in the Machine and exercise interactive controls
As a researcher, I want a primary CLI for run/evaluate/rejudge/resume/export workflows.
README.md:46; AGENTS.md scripts reference; package.json scripts eval
eval-cli --help/list command exits and prints configured cells/scenarios
As a researcher, I want reproducible scripts for effects, traces, reliability, trajectories, change, stagnation, and mechanism analyses.
package.json exposes analyze:* scripts and scripts/ANALYSIS-SCRIPTS.md is referenced as registry.
As an author, I want scripts to validate paper claims, generate tables/figures, and rebuild the paper.
paper:* scripts validate bug claims, provable discourse, generate comics, tables, and figures; build.sh paper2 builds canonical PDF.
package.json scripts paper:*; AGENTS.md Paper & Validation
paper:provable-discourse:smoke passes without full PDF build
As a researcher, I want scripts to run, replay, inspect, and score dramatic derivation loops.
As a researcher, I want scripts for poetics ingest/report/adaptation/replay/package/browser workflows.
package.json scripts poetics:*; CLAUDE.md Poetics section
poetics report and browser help run without paid calls
As a researcher, I want scripts to validate, materialize, packetize, adjudicate, merge, and report A19/A19R work.
a19:* and a19r:* scripts cover validation, packet building, adjudication assignment, codebook validation, QA, and reports.
package.json scripts a19:*; package.json scripts a19r:*
A19/A19R validators and human-coder CLI help run offline
As a maintainer, I want content packages validated before use in evaluation or drama generation.
npm run content:validate executes scripts/validate-content.js over course content.
content package and scenario references validate
As a maintainer, I want tests to run against temp DB/log paths so production data is safe.
npm run test:hermetic sets EVAL_DB_PATH and EVAL_LOGS_DIR to mktemp paths before node --test.
package.json script test:hermetic; AGENTS.md Hermetic Testing
npm run test:hermetic passes against isolated DB/log paths
Shared techne CSS and nav rail
As a user, I want consistent navigation and visual styling across eval, pilot, adjudication, and poetics pages.
Static surfaces load /components/techne.css and/or /components/rail-inject.js with active route markers.
Playwright loads core pages and captures console/page errors

Smoke: techne.css served with design tokens Smoke: [{"route":"/","status":200,"title":"machine spirits · eval","bodyChars":1266,"issues":[{"type":"error","text":"Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (Not Found)"}]},{"route":"/chat","status":200,"title":"Machine Spirits / Chat — Composing a Tutor, MMXXVI","bodyChars":1879,"issues":[{"type":"error","text":"Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (Not Found)"}]},{"route":"/pilot","status":200,"title":"Fractions Tutoring Study","bodyChars":534,"issues":[]},{"route":"/pilot-admin","status":200,"title":"Pilot · Admin","bodyChars":37,"issues":[...
As a maintainer, I want a no-spend Scriptorium UX smoke command so responsive and accessibility regressions are caught before shell work ships.

The command probes the core dashboard surfaces at desktop and mobile sizes for HTTP render, console errors, horizontal overflow, duplicate landmarks, unlabeled controls, touch-target risks, and emits a report with screenshots.
Implement and run the planned no-spend Scriptorium UX smoke gate; expected first baseline can fail before fixes.
As a dashboard user, I want one responsive Scriptorium shell with clear navigation, current context, and readable layouts so every surface feels like one coherent application.
The shell provides stable nav, breadcrumbs/context, mobile drawer behavior, keyboard-visible focus, consistent rail/header treatment, and no horizontal overflow across the dashboard routes.
Run the Scriptorium UX smoke gate across desktop and mobile plus focused browser checks on navigation and shell state.
As an operator, I want the dashboard home page to explain what is ready, what data is missing, and what action to take next so first-run use does not require repo memory.
Home/readiness views show server health, data availability, empty-state recovery paths, project board status, and next actions without needing CLI archaeology.
Run no-data and normal-data browser smoke cases, then verify empty states and recovery links.
As a researcher, I want browse, proof, replay, ontology, and transcript surfaces organized as evidence workbenches so I can inspect artifacts without guessing routes.
Evidence surfaces expose filters, provenance, empty states, artifact links, route-specific actions, and stable comparison/replay affordances in a shared interaction pattern.
Run evidence-surface browser smoke and inspect browse/derivation/replay/ontology affordances with representative local artifacts.
Compose, launch, and job monitor flows
As a creator, I want compose/live-compose/generation flows to make cost class, validation, launch state, and job progress explicit so I can safely create artifacts.
Creation surfaces distinguish no-spend from paid actions, validate inputs before launch, expose job state and recovery, and keep generated outputs linked back to board/workbench context.
Run no-spend compose/live-compose smoke, then verify validation, disabled states, job status, and artifact links.
As a maintainer, I want dashboard review surfaces and the workplan board to form one loop so issues discovered in Scriptorium can become tracked work without duplication.
Review and board pages surface active/triaged/blocked work, show linked evidence, preserve item ownership/verification, and offer clear handoff paths back to CLI/item files.
Run workplan validation plus dashboard board/review browser smoke and verify linked evidence is reachable.
Static tools and desktop UX parity
As a desktop user, I want static explanatory tools and the Electron wrapper to preserve the same UX quality as the web dashboard so local desktop use is not a second-class path.
Static tools and desktop embeds keep shared styling, predictable navigation, readable layouts, asset integrity, and desktop-specific store/path behavior in sync with the web stack.
Run static-page visual smoke plus npm run desktop:test after UX changes touch shared routes/assets.

GET /api/a19/adjudication/assignment with the default generated assignment absent.

Exercise home/readiness pages with normal and intentionally sparse local data.
The UI names missing data, next actions, and safe recovery paths without relying on route memory.
Run browser smoke on browse, derivation, replay, ontology/proof, and transcript evidence surfaces with local artifacts.
Each workbench exposes filters, provenance, empty states, and artifact links consistently.
Run no-spend compose/live-compose checks and inspect validation, disabled states, cost labels, job state, and output links.
Creation flows make cost class and launch state explicit before any paid/model-backed action.
Validate workplan data, load board/review surfaces, and verify linked evidence/verification fields remain reachable.
Board/review views reflect item status, ownership, verification, and links without duplicating source-of-truth item content.
Run static-page visual smoke and npm run desktop:test after shared UX changes.
Static tools and Electron keep shared styling, asset integrity, navigation, and writable-store behavior aligned with web routes.
